name: claude-skills-marketplace
description: A curated marketplace of Claude Code plugins for software engineering workflows. Includes engineering-workflow, visual-documentation, productivity, and code-operations plugins with SKILL.md files, agents, scripts, and an MCP-based code execution runtime with sandboxing.

findings_summary.notes: Well-structured marketplace with 4 plugin categories (engineering-workflow, visual-documentation, productivity, code-operations). SKILL.md files are well-formatted with trigger descriptions. The smart_commit.sh script handles git staging, commit message generation, and push — uses 'git add .' which stages all files (broad but expected). The code-execution skill references an execution-runtime with a sandboxed Python executor using RestrictedPython, resource limits, allowed-only import whitelist, and removal of dangerous builtins (eval, exec, __import__, open). A PII detector is also included. The MCP server (FastMCP) provides secure code execution. The conversation-analyzer's analyze_history.py script reads Claude session history files from ~/.claude/conversations — this is read-only analysis of local data. Template HTML files for visual documentation are static SVG/HTML with no scripts. No exfiltration, no hardcoded credentials, no obfuscation. The setup.sh for execution-runtime installs Python dependencies via pip/uv. Apache-2.0 licensed. A .claude/install-gh.sh script installs the GitHub CLI if missing — benign provisioning. High overall quality.
